commands.author: xydigit-sj
commands.command: this is not a duplicate of #80818. #80818 adds `appprincipal` to the setup input type and adds a `.describe()` annotation on the zod schema — it does **not** add any validation. this pr adds `superrefine` validation to `googlechatconfigschema` so that `audiencetype="app-url"` configurations **without** `appprincipal` are rejected at config parse time, rather than silently passing validation and failing at runtime. it also validates the same constraint for per-account overrides and inherited parent `audiencetype`. the two prs are complementary: #80818 covers the setup/docs surface, this pr covers the config validation layer.
commands.freeform_prompt: This is not a duplicate of #80818. #80818 adds `appPrincipal` to the setup input type and adds a `.describe()` annotation on the zod schema — it does **not** add any validation. This PR adds `superRefine` validation to `GoogleChatConfigSchema` so that `audienceType="app-url"` configurations **without** `appPrincipal` are rejected at config parse time, rather than silently passing validation and failing at runtime. It also validates the same constraint for per-account overrides and inherited parent `audienceType`. The two PRs are complementary: #80818 covers the setup/docs surface, this PR covers the config validation layer.

target.title: fix(googlechat): validate appPrincipal is required when audienceType is app-url
target.body:
## Summary

When `audienceType` is `"app-url"`, the `appPrincipal` field (OAuth 2.0 client ID) is required for Google Chat add-on token validation. Previously, omitting `appPrincipal` in this mode would silently pass schema validation, leading to a confusing runtime failure.

This complements the runtime warning added in #71145 by enforcing the requirement at the config schema level.

## Changes

- Add `superRefine` validation to `GoogleChatConfigSchema` that rejects `app-url` configurations without `appPrincipal`
- Propagate the same validation to per-account overrides (`accounts.*`)
- Inherit parent `audienceType` for account-level validation when not explicitly overridden
- Update JSDoc comments on `appPrincipal` to document the requirement
- Update `docs/channels/googlechat.md` example and notes
- Add regression tests covering:
  - `app-url` with/without `appPrincipal`
  - Empty/whitespace `appPrincipal`
  - `project-number` without `appPrincipal` (still allowed)
  - Account-level overrides with inherited parent `audienceType`

## Validation

- `pnpm test src/config/config.googlechat-appprincipal.test.ts` — 8/8 passed
- `pnpm test src/plugins/contracts/config-footprint-guardrails.test.ts` — 11/11 passed
- `pnpm exec oxlint` — 0 warnings, 0 errors

## Compatibility

- No breaking change for existing valid configs
- `project-number` audience type is unaffected
